# Implement Predictive Scheduling with AI

## Description
Develop AI-powered predictive scheduling that learns from family patterns and suggests optimal times for events based on historical data and preferences.

## Use Case
When a user says "I need to schedule a doctor's appointment", the AI suggests the best available times based on family routines, avoiding busy periods and considering everyone's preferences.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Learn from family scheduling patterns
- [ ] Suggest optimal times for new events
- [ ] Consider family member preferences
- [ ] Avoid scheduling during busy periods
- [ ] Adapt to changing routines
- [ ] Provide reasoning for suggestions
- [ ] Handle multiple family members' schedules

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement machine learning for pattern recognition
- [ ] Create preference learning system
- [ ] Develop scheduling optimization algorithm
- [ ] Add predictive analytics tools
- [ ] Update AI agent with predictive capabilities
- [ ] Store and analyze scheduling patterns

## Implementation Notes
- Use simple ML models initially (decision trees)
- Store family preferences and patterns
- Consider privacy implications of data collection
- Implement explainable AI for suggestions
